name: AI Chat Trigger - API Checking, Input Validation and Telegram Integration

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Invalid Prompt Rules

**Signal 1 - Same character repeated 4+ times:**
```
aaaaaaaaaaaaa → blocked ❌
zzzzzzzz      → blocked ❌
balloon       → allowed ✅ (only 2 repeats)
```
---
**Signal 2 - Repeating 2-character pattern:**
```
hahahaha   → blocked ❌
ababababab → blocked ❌
bookkeeper → allowed ✅
```
**Signal 3 - Invalid AI model or non existing AI Model:**
```
.../models/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-wrong_endpoint
.../models/black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-fake
to fix it,, it the model should be /FLUX.1-schnell
```
**Signal 4 - by default the first thing to check is the API Key**
```
If the API Key is invalid or expired it will always fall back to API Key Checker
```

parameters.responseBody:
=🔑 *Invalid or Expired API Key*

The Hugging Face API key is not authorized (HTTP {{ $json.statusCode }}).

Please update the API key in the Generate Image node.

=✅ *Image Generated Successfully!*

📝 *Prompt:* {{ $('Get Prompt').item.json.prompt }}

📱 Your image has been sent to Telegram!
🤖 Model: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell

=⚠️ *AI Model Sleeping or Overloaded*

Status: {{ $json.statusCode }}

The free Hugging Face API sometimes takes 20–30 seconds to wake up.
Please try again in a moment.

parameters.content:
## 📱 Telegram Setup

**Step 1 — Create bot:**
- Message @BotFather on Telegram
- Send `/newbot` → get your **Bot Token**

**Step 2 — Get your Chat ID:**
- Start chat with your bot
- Visit: `https://api.telegram.org/bot<TOKEN>/getUpdates`
- Find `"chat":{"id": 123456789}`

**Step 3 — n8n Credentials:**
- Sidebar → Credentials → Add Credential
- Search: **Telegram**
- Paste Bot Token → Save as `Telegram Bot`

**Step 4 — n8n Variable:**
- Settings → Variables
- Add: `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID` = your chat ID number

parameters.responseBody:
=❌ *Invalid Prompt*

{{ $('Validate Prompt').item.json.reason }}

✅ *Good examples:*
• a futuristic city at night
• a cute cat on a wooden bench
• an astronaut riding a horse on Mars

parameters.initialMessages:
Hi! 👋 Welcome to the AI Image Generator!

Type a prompt and I'll generate an image and send it to Telegram.

*Example:* a futuristic cat on Mars 🚀
